message:
feat: implement comprehensive component redesign with violet theme

Complete visual redesign of all major components to match refined design system,
featuring violet accents, horizontal mobile scrolling, enhanced depth, and improved typography.

═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
HOMEPAGE (app/page.tsx)
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

Mobile Horizontal Scrolling Pattern (NEW):
Applied to three main sections for better mobile UX:

1. "Where I sit" cards
2. Featured projects
3. Writing highlights

Implementation:
- Container: flex with overflow-x-auto (instead of grid on mobile)
- Snap: snap-x snap-mandatory for iOS-style snap points
- Cards: snap-center shrink-0 with fixed widths
  * w-[85vw] on mobile (85% viewport width)
  * w-[60vw] on sm breakpoint
  * md:w-auto reverts to grid layout
- Spacing: -mx-4 px-4 creates full-width scroll
- Hide scrollbar: no-scrollbar utility class
- Desktop: md:grid md:grid-cols-X returns to grid layout

Benefits:
- Natural mobile gesture (horizontal swipe)
- iOS-like snap behavior
- Better use of screen real estate
- More engaging than vertical stacking
- Maintains grid on desktop

"Where I sit" Cards Redesign:
BEFORE: Static bordered cards with grid layout
AFTER: Horizontal scrolling glass cards with enhanced typography

Changes:
- Layout: grid → flex scroll container
- Cards: rounded-2xl → rounded-3xl (more dramatic curves)
- Background: border bg-slate-950/80 → glass-card utility
- Padding: p-6/md:p-8 → p-8 (consistent, generous)
- Typography improvements:
  * Labels: text-xs/md:text-sm → text-[10px] (tiny, subtle)
  * Labels: font-semibold → font-bold
  * Labels: tracking-[0.24em] → tracking-widest
  * Labels: Added drop-shadow-sm and shadow-{color}/20
  * Titles: text-lg/md:text-xl → text-xl/md:text-2xl (larger)
  * Titles: font-semibold → font-bold
  * Titles: leading-snug → leading-tight (tighter for impact)
  * Body: text-sm/md:text-base → text-base (consistent)
  * Body: text-slate-300 → text-slate-400 (de-emphasized)

Label Colors:
- Infrastructure: text-sky-300/90 → text-sky-400 (brighter)
- Agent tooling: text-emerald-300/90 → text-emerald-400
- Markets: text-fuchsia-300/90 → text-fuchsia-400
- All with shadow glows for depth

Content Update:
- Removed "UBS" from tools list (SmartEdgar, MCP Agent Mail only)
- Simplified to focus on primary products

Featured Projects:
- Wrapped ProjectCard in snap-center container
- Same horizontal scroll pattern
- Cards maintain full height (h-full)

Writing/Threads Sections:
Similar treatment to homepage cards:
- Horizontal scroll on mobile
- glass-card styling
- Enhanced typography (same pattern as above)
- Rounded-3xl for modern look

═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
HERO SECTION (components/hero.tsx)
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

Layout & Spacing:
- Min height: min-h-[90vh] → min-h-[95vh] (taller, more dramatic)
- Container: Added justify-center for vertical centering
- Desktop padding: lg:pt-40 → lg:pt-32 (balanced top/bottom)
- Content gap: gap-8 → gap-10 (more breathing room)
- Max width: max-w-3xl/lg:max-w-2xl → max-w-4xl/lg:max-w-3xl (wider)
- Desktop padding: Added lg:pr-10 for better balance with 3D scene

NEW Ambient Light Source:
- Added decorative light blob at top center
- Size: 800x800px
- Color: bg-sky-500/5 (very subtle)
- Blur: 120px (massive soft glow)
- Position: -top-[20%] left-1/2 (partially off-screen)
- Effect: Creates subtle lighting from above, adds depth

Headshot Redesign:
BEFORE: Static circle with border
AFTER: Animated, glowing profile photo

Changes:
- Wrapper: Added group class for hover effects
- Size: h-16/sm:h-20 → maintained, but enhanced
- Removed: Static border-2, bg-slate-900, ring-2 styles
- NEW: Pulsing glow background
  * animate-pulse bg-sky-500/20
  * blur-md for soft halo
  * group-hover:bg-sky-400/30 (brighter on hover)
- Image: Added ring-2 ring-slate-800/50 directly on image
- Animation: transition-transform duration-500 group-hover:scale-110
- Effect: Headshot glows and zooms on hover

Name/Title Redesign:
- Container: Added gap-1 between name and title
- Name size: text-sm → text-base (larger)
- Name weight: font-bold (maintained)
- Name color: text-slate-200 → text-slate-100 (lighter)

NEW: Pulsing "Available" Indicator:
- Container: flex items-center gap-2
- Outer pulse: absolute animate-ping h-2 w-2 rounded-full bg-emerald-400 opacity-75
- Inner dot: relative h-2 w-2 rounded-full bg-emerald-500
- Creates attention-grabbing "online now" effect
- Positioned before "Founder & CEO" text

Title Styling:
- Size: text-xs → text-xs (maintained)
- Weight: font-medium → font-bold
- Tracking: tracking-widest (maintained)
- Color: text-sky-400 → text-sky-400/90 (slightly transparent)

Headline Typography:
- Size: text-5xl/sm:7xl/lg:8xl → text-5xl/sm:7xl/lg:[5.5rem]/xl:[6rem]
- Leading: leading-[0.95] → leading-[0.9] (tighter)
- Tracking: tracking-tighter → tracking-[-0.04em] (explicit tighter)
- Added text-balance-pro class (prevents orphans)
- Gradient span: Added filter drop-shadow-sm (subtle glow on gradient text)

Body Text:
- Max width: max-w-xl → max-w-2xl (wider, more comfortable)
- Font: Added font-medium
- Color: text-slate-400 → text-slate-400/90
- Leading: leading-relaxed → leading-relaxed/md:leading-loose
- Creates better reading experience

CTA Container:
- Padding: pt-4 → maintained

Stats Section:
- (No changes shown in diff, likely in separate file)

3D Scene Container:
- (No significant changes shown)

═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
PROJECT CARDS (components/project-card.tsx)
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

(Changes from previous spotlight commit maintained)
Integration with cn() utility for className management.

═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
SECTION SHELL (components/section-shell.tsx)
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

(Previous animation refinements maintained)
No additional changes in this commit.

═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
SITE HEADER (components/site-header.tsx)
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

(Previous navigation redesign maintained)
No additional changes in this commit.

═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
SITE FOOTER (components/site-footer.tsx)
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

Container Redesign:
- Margin: mt-16 → mt-32 (more separation from content)
- Border: border-top-muted → border-t border-white/5 (explicit, subtle)
- Background: bg-slate-950/90 → bg-slate-950/30 (more transparent)
- Added: backdrop-blur-lg (glassmorphism effect)
- Max width: max-w-6xl → max-w-7xl (wider)
- Padding: py-10/lg:py-10 → py-12/lg:py-16 (more generous)
- Gap: gap-6 → gap-8 (more space)

Text Content:
- NEW: max-w-md space-y-2 container (better text layout)
- Name: text-sm → text-lg (much larger)
- Name weight: font-medium → font-bold
- Name tracking: Added tracking-tight
- Tagline: text-xs → text-sm (larger)
- Tagline: Added leading-relaxed
- Tagline color: text-slate-400 → text-slate-500 (de-emphasized)
- NEW: Copyright line with year (legal protection)

Social Icons Redesign:
BEFORE: Individual static links with borders
AFTER: Mapped array with enhanced hover effects

Array Structure:
- Cleaner code with .map() over social links array
- Each icon: { href, icon, label }

Icon Styling:
- Size: h-9/w-9 → h-12/w-12 (larger touch targets)
- Layout: Added group relative classes
- Background: border bg-slate-950/90 → border bg-white/5
- Border: border-slate-700/80 → border-white/5 (more subtle)
- Colors: text-slate-200 → text-slate-400 (starting state)
- Hover background: bg-white/10
- Hover border: border-white/10
- Hover text: text-white (full brightness)
- Hover scale: Added scale-110 (subtle zoom)
- Icon animation: group-hover:rotate-12 (playful twist)
- All transitions: transition-all (smooth everything)

═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
TIMELINE (components/timeline.tsx)
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

(Previous timeline redesign with vertical line maintained)
No additional changes in this commit.

═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
DESIGN SYSTEM COHESION
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

Unified Patterns Across Components:

1. Glass Cards:
   - All cards use glass-card utility
   - Consistent rounded-3xl (was rounded-2xl)
   - Horizontal scroll on mobile
   - Snap points for native feel

2. Typography Hierarchy:
   - Tiny labels: text-[10px] font-bold tracking-widest
   - Card titles: text-xl/2xl font-bold leading-tight
   - Body: text-base text-slate-400
   - Headings tighter tracking (-0.04em)

3. Color System:
   - Sky-400 for primary accents
   - Violet-400 for selection/secondary
   - Emerald-400 for success/availability
   - Fuchsia-400 for tertiary accents
   - Slate-400 for body text
   - White/5-10 for borders and glass

4. Interactions:
   - Hover scale effects (scale-110)
   - Rotate animations (rotate-12)
   - Smooth transitions (0.4s, cubic-bezier)
   - Snap scrolling on mobile
   - Pulsing indicators (animate-ping)

5. Spacing:
   - Larger gaps everywhere (gap-8, gap-10)
   - Generous padding (p-8 standard)
   - More whitespace (mt-32 footer)
   - Better breathing room

Impact Summary:

MOBILE UX:
- Natural horizontal swipe gestures
- iOS-style snap points
- Hidden scrollbars (clean)
- Larger touch targets (h-12 icons)
- Better use of screen width

VISUAL POLISH:
- Glassmorphism throughout
- Pulsing availability indicator
- Glowing headshot on hover
- Animated social icons
- Enhanced depth with shadows

TYPOGRAPHY:
- Clearer hierarchy (10px → base → xl → 2xl)
- Tighter headline tracking
- Better body text leading
- Professional text balance

PERFORMANCE:
- GPU-accelerated transforms
- Efficient snap scrolling
- Optimized backdrop-blur
- No layout shifts

This comprehensive redesign creates a cohesive, premium design system
with violet/purple accents, modern glassmorphism, and mobile-first
horizontal scrolling patterns.
